title: Roja Roja Lyrics Kadhalar Dhinam

Roja....Roja ...
Roja Roja Roja Roja
Roja Roja Roja Roja

Roja Roja Roja Roja
Roja Roja Roja Roja

kanda pinnae unnidathil
ennai vittu veedu vandhaen

unai thendral
theendavum vidamaatten.
andha thingal
theendavum vidamaatten.
unai vaeru kaigalil
tharamaatten
naan tharamaatten
naan tharamaatten

Roja....Roja ...
Roja....Roja ...

nilathil un nizhal
vila yaenguven.
nizhal vilundha manalayum
madiyinil thaanguven

udaiyena eduthu
enai uduthu
noolaadai kodimalar
idaiyinai uruthum
roja.

un peyar mella
naan sonnadhum
en veettu rojaakkal
pookkindrana

ornaal unnai kaanavidil
engae un anbendru
kaetkindrana

nee vandhaal
maruganam vidyum
en vaanamae.

mazhayil nee
nenaigayil enakku
kaaichal varum

veyilil nadakkayil
enaku vaervai varum

udalgal naam rendu
unarvugal ondru
roja roja..roja..

Roja Roja Roja Roja
Roja Roja Roja Roja

kanda pinnae unnidathil
ennai vittu veedu vandhaen

illaiyavalin idai
oru noolagam.
padithidavaa pani vizhum
iravugal aayiram.

idaiveli edharkku
sol namakku
un naanam oru murai
vidumurai eduthaal enna.

ennai theenda koodaathena
vaanodu sollaadhu
vangak kadal.

ennai yaendha koodaathena
kaiyyodu solladhu
pullaangulazh.

nee thottaal nilavinil
karaigalum neengumae.
vizhigalil valindhidum
azhagu neer veelzhchiye

enakku nee
unai thara edharku
aaraaichiye

unai vida vaeru
ninaivugal yaedhu
roja roja. roja..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Roja Roja'?

The song 'Roja Roja' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Kadhalar Dhinam'?

In Kadhalar Dhinam, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the protagonist's feelings for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Roja Roja'?

The song is sung by Unnikrishnan and composed by AR Rahman, known for his innovative music style.

When was 'Roja Roja' released?

'Roja Roja' was released on July 9, 1999, as part of the movie Kadhalar Dhinam.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Roja Roja', the protagonist expresses his deep affection and yearning for his beloved, encapsulating the essence of romantic love. The song's soothing melody, composed by AR Rahman, complements the heartfelt lyrics penned by Vaali, creating an emotional atmosphere. This track serves as a significant moment in the film Kadhalar Dhinam, where love blossoms amidst challenges. The nostalgic vibe of the song evokes a sense of longing and warmth, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Roja Roja from the Kadhalar Dhinam soundtrack is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully showcases the soulful voice of Unnikrishnan. With the magical composition of AR Rahman and heartfelt lyrics by Vaali, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the enchanting world of this classic hit that continues to resonate with listeners even today.
stanzaMeanings: After seeing you, I have come to your place, leaving my home.
I won't let the breeze go without you. I won't let the moonlight go without you. I won't give you to anyone else; I won't give you to anyone else.
On the ground, I will create your shadow. I will rest in the shade of the shadow that falls.
Taking what I have, I will give you a thread of flowers, a beautiful red rose.
When I softly say your name, the roses in my house bloom.
Wherever I look for you, I ask where my love is.
If you come, my sky will shine.
In the rain, you will come to my thoughts.
When I walk in the sunlight, I will feel the heat.
Our bodies have two feelings, one is a rose, rose... rose...
After seeing you, I have come to your place, leaving my home.
There is a world of a girl who is not here. Will you read it? Thousands of nights will fall.
Why should we say anything? My pride will take away your freedom.
Don't say anything to me; just take the love.
If you touch, will the moonlight also fade? The beautiful water will flow from your eyes.
Why should I ask you to give me? Who else can I ask?
What thoughts can be there other than you? Rose, rose... rose...
After seeing you, I have come to your place, leaving my home.
